author.bio: Great posts from the amazing https://dev.to community, with some opinion and humor mixed in. Created by @bendhalpern. Join https://dev.to!
author.name: DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻

content.text:
Why I hate Infinite Scrolling:

1. I can't find your menubar
2. I can't find contact details and other key info
3. I can't navigate between different pages
4. I don't know when it will end
 https://dev.to/maheshkay/why-i-hate-infinite-scrolling-52e6
